## Type of Change

- [ ] New project addition
- [ ] Update existing project
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Automation / script improvement

## Checklist

- [ ] JSON file follows the schema defined in `schemas/project.schema.json`
- [ ] All required fields are present and correctly formatted
- [ ] The file is placed in the correct category directory
- [ ] The `id` field is unique and uses lowercase-hyphenated format
- [ ] URLs are valid and point to official sources
- [ ] I have run `python scripts/validate.py` and it passes
- [ ] I have checked for duplicates
